es-MX.title: Mira TV
es-MX.subtitle: Reproductor de medios personal
es-MX.description:
Mira TV es un reproductor multimedia que se conecta al servidor de medios que tú configures con tus propias credenciales. Accede a tu catálogo personal: canales en vivo, películas y series.

Mira TV no incluye ni distribuye ningún contenido: únicamente reproduce el catálogo del servidor que el usuario configura. Necesitas una suscripción activa con tu propio proveedor.

Características:
• Canales en vivo, películas y series desde tu servidor
• Continuar viendo y favoritos
• Selector de audio y subtítulos
• Búsqueda y filtrado por categorías
• Tus credenciales se guardan cifradas en el dispositivo

en-US.title: Mira TV
en-US.subtitle: Your personal media player
en-US.description:
Mira TV is a media player that connects to the server you configure with your own credentials. Access your personal catalog: live channels, movies and series.

Mira TV does not include or distribute any content: it only plays the catalog of the server you configure. An active subscription with your own provider is required.

Features:
• Live channels, movies and series from your server
• Continue watching and favorites
• Audio and subtitle track selection
• Search and category filtering
• Your credentials are stored encrypted on the device

review.notes:
GUIDELINE 5.2.3:
Mira TV is a generic media player client, comparable to VLC or Infuse. It does not include, host, distribute, or provide any streaming content or catalog. The app connects exclusively to media servers configured by the end user with their own credentials from their own subscription. The app has no backend infrastructure and no built-in content.

Terms of Use (full text): https://kevinarce98.github.io/mira-tv/terms/ — and also viewable inside the app (setup screen 'Terms of Use' link, and Settings). Sections 3 and 4 state that users are solely responsible for ensuring the content they access is lawfully licensed, and that use with infringing content is expressly prohibited. The setup screen requires the user to check 'I have read and accept the Terms of Use' before any connection can be made.

GUIDELINE 2.1(a) — DEMO MODE WITH PRE-POPULATED, PLAYABLE CONTENT:
To review every feature without a personal subscription, use the built-in demo mode:
1. On the setup screen, check the 'I have read and accept the Terms of Use' box.
2. Tap 'Explore in demo mode' (below the 'or' divider).
3. The catalog loads immediately with pre-populated live channels, movies, and series.

The demo ships ONLY royalty-free, openly licensed content (Blender Foundation open movies under Creative Commons, and standard public test streams). PLAYBACK FULLY WORKS in demo mode — tap any movie, episode, or live channel and it plays. All other features are functional: catalog browsing, search, favorites, continue watching, settings, theme, and language switching.
